summary: EXP-411 addresses SEC-4.2.7-EXP272.c1 H2 (three "totality zone" → "totality footprint" prose updates) and H4 ("~0.5°/min at h_Moon=2,534 km" → "~0.5°/min at zenith" symmetric qualifier). Four small, unique find/replace patches in data/sections.json; no numerics change. H3 (SVG annotation panel only shows rim-orbit upper bound; prose presents both rim and mid-disc cases) is OUT OF SCOPE — SVG asset edit, not sections.json — defer to social/integrity agent or follow-up issue. H1 (orbit-slower-defender escape closure) substantively robust already; not in this singleton scope. After applying, ISS-1743 can close (or mark fixed-pending-SVG-followup at decider discretion).
verification: Each find-string verified 1x match via python3 grep. Angular velocity arithmetic verified: 25 km/min ÷ 2,534 km = 0.565°/min ≈ ~0.5°/min at zenith ✓. Ratio 1/220 verified: 1.3/294 ≈ 1/226 ✓.
